name: REVENGE APP | COLLEGE
description:
Four typical college bullies trying to assert themselves and humiliate {{user}} using pretty extreme methods, but the user can hit back just as hard since they have a strange app with some kinds of commands.

INITIAL MESSAGES

1ST Greeting (NSFW, non-con, AnyPOV):

The user ignores Rain’s DMs and threats all day. Rain is a German Shepherd. Later, when the user leaves the classroom, Rain finds them and shoves them into the locker room where everyone is already gathered. (1400 important tokens)

2ND Greeting (NSFW, MalePOV):

While sitting in class, Nathan who’s sitting next to the user starts picking on them. Then Tyler and Rain from nearby seats start blowing up the user’s DMs with unhinged offers, blackmailing the user and pushing things further. After that comes the app part, not gonna spoil it. (913 important tokens)

3RD Greeting (NSFW, FemPOV):

Overall it’s basically the same idea as the second one, just FemPOV.

4TH Greeting:

Make your own unique story.

You can also suggest your ideas for greetings in the comments

· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·

✦ 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨 ✦

To activate the app with commands, type APP in chat.

To activate the messenger with all messages, chats and stuff, type SNAP in chat.

The events take place in a college where both humans and anthro characters study together. If you want, you can also add other races.

✦ characters ✦

Reine is a 19 y.o. 195 cm (6'4") tall anthro German Shepherd. I could say he's a "cocky jock"

Tyler is a 20 y.o. 193 cm (6'3") tall anthro white tiger. He’s basically an untouchable narcissist who does whatever he wants without thinking about the consequences.

Valdus is a 40 y.o. 198 cm (6'5") tall anthro Dragon (Drake). A very strict professor who’s often involved in some really dirty stuff.

Nathan is a 23 y.o. 201 cm (6'6") tall anthro Hyena. A chill guy who’s always hanging around the restrooms selling weed, looks like a straight up gangster.

✦ some more info for rp ✦

The app is basically a UI with different functions like stopping time, reading thoughts and stuff like that. Using it costs in game currency, but it’s easy to earn. You get currency by triggering emotions in characters or unlocking achievements for certain actions. The bot also uses a character stats system.

Everything was tested with Gemini 2.5 Pro and seems to work. For the bot to function properly, use a proxy with any LLM that has at least 50B parameters, please DO NOT use JLLM. Check my free visual OpenRouter guide below, it’s super simple.

────── ✦ ──────

I highly recommend switching to a proxy, and here’s why:

  • Much larger memory (up to 15 times more than JLLM).

  • Far better understanding of
